item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 021930Z AUTO VRB03KT 9999 FEW035 BKN100 OVC130 15/15 Q1014 TEMPO 4000 RA
🟡 TAF LFOT 021700Z 0218/0318 18008KT 9999 FEW030 BKN070 PROB30 TEMPO 0218/0220 SHRA FEW060TCU TEMPO 0221/0306 4000 RA BKN015 PROB40 TEMPO 0301/0309 BKN006 TEMPO 0309/0318 SHRA BKN015 SCT025CB PROB40 TEMPO 0312/0317 25012G23KT 3000 TSRA
